# section329.org

> Guide to Section 329 -- attorney fee disgorgement in bankruptcy.

section329.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://section329.org/ -- Attorney fee disgorgement overview
- https://section329.org/disclosure-requirements.html -- Rule 2016(b) disclosure requirements
- https://section329.org/how-to-file.html -- How to request a fee review

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
